info.title: Scoop.it API
info.description: Scoop.it is a content curation platform. The API provides programmatic access to user profiles, curated topics, posts, notifications, search, suggestion engines, and recipient lists. Supports both anonymous access (read-only with consumer token) and authenticated access (full read/write with OAuth 2.0).

tags.name: Search
tags.description: Search for users, topics, and posts

get.description: Retrieve a user's profile data including curated topics, followed topics, tags, and statistics.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: User ID. If omitted along with shortName, returns the authenticated user's profile.

parameters.name: curated
parameters.description: Number of curated posts per topic to include.

parameters.name: curable
parameters.description: Number of curable posts to include.

parameters.name: ncomments
parameters.description: Number of comments per post to include.

parameters.name: filterCuratedTopicsByCreationDateFrom
parameters.description: Filter curated topics created after this timestamp (ms since epoch).

parameters.name: filterCuratedTopicsByCreationDateTo
parameters.description: Filter curated topics created before this timestamp (ms since epoch).

get.description: Retrieve a topic and its curated/curable posts. Requires either id or urlName.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Topic ID. Required unless urlName is provided.

parameters.name: urlName
parameters.description: Topic URL name. Required unless id is provided.

parameters.name: curated
parameters.description: Number of curated posts to return.

parameters.name: curable
parameters.description: Number of curable (suggested) posts to return.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Sort order for posts. Required if 'since' is not provided.

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: Tag(s) to filter by. Required when order is 'tag'.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query. Required when order is 'search'.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Return posts newer than this timestamp (ms since epoch).

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Return posts older than this timestamp (ms since epoch).

post.description: Execute an action on a topic: edit, reorder, follow, unfollow, or markread.

action.description: Action to perform on the topic.

get.description: Retrieve a single post by ID.

post.description: Execute an action on a post: prepare, create, comment, thank, accept (curate), forward, refuse, delete, edit, pin, rescoop, or share.

id.description: Post ID (required for most actions except prepare and create).

url.description: URL to prepare or create a post from.

tag[].description: Tags to assign to the post.

directLink.description: Whether the post links directly to the source URL.

resolveUrl.description: Whether to resolve the URL (create action).

publicationDate.description: Publication date as timestamp in ms since epoch.

scheduleDate.description: Schedule date as timestamp in ms since epoch.

get.description: Verify authentication credentials. Returns the connected user object or null if anonymous.
Retrieve user notifications since a given timestamp.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Return notifications after this timestamp (ms since epoch).

get.description: Retrieve a compiled feed of posts from specified topics or topic groups.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Return posts since this timestamp (ms since epoch).

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Maximum number of posts to return.

get.description: Search across the Scoop.it platform for users, topics, or posts.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type of object to search for.

parameters.name: topicId
parameters.description: Restrict search to a specific topic.

get.description: Resolve a User or Topic object by its short name to get its ID.
Retrieve an interest category and optionally its associated topics, users, and posts.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Interest ID. Required unless shortName is provided.

parameters.name: shortName
parameters.description: Interest short name. Required unless id is provided.

get.description: Retrieve the Smart Source Engine configuration for a topic.

post.description: Update the Smart Source Engine configuration for a topic.

get.description: Retrieve all suggestion engines for the authenticated user.

post.description: Update the configuration of a suggestion engine.

maxSuggestionAge.description: Maximum age of suggestions in days. -1 for no limit.

get.description: Retrieve all sources configured for a suggestion engine.

put.description: Add a new managed source to a suggestion engine.

type.description: Source type (e.g., rss, twitter_follow_user, twitter_search, twitter_list, webpage, advanced_search).

rssUrl.description: RSS feed URL (required if type is rss).

post.description: Update the name of a suggestion engine source.

delete.description: Remove a source from a suggestion engine.

get.description: Retrieve content suggestions from a suggestion engine.

post.description: Refresh specific suggestions by their IDs.

get.description: Retrieve all recipient lists for the authenticated user.

post.description: Add or remove an email address from a recipient list.

email.description: Email address to subscribe or unsubscribe.

BadRequest.description: Bad request. Missing or invalid parameters.

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing authentication credentials.

Forbidden.description: Forbidden. Insufficient permissions for this operation.

Post.description: A curated post within a topic.

scoopUrl.description: URL on Scoop.it for this post.

TopicTag.description: A tag associated with a topic or post.

maxSuggestionAge.description: Max suggestion age in days. -1 for no limit.
